name: Waldorf Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith Apples, cored and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 1 1/2 pounds small red potatoes until tender (about half an hour), then drain and halve.
2. In a small saucepan, heat cider vinegar and sugar until the sugar dissolves.
3. Toss the hot potatoes with chopped onion, salt, and pepper to taste, sour cream or yogurt, mayonnaise, peeled and diced celery ribs, ham, and apples.
4. Serve 4 servings.
